rulings.Case Title: LINDA NIELSON et al VS. J-M MANUFACTURING COMPANY INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And To Seal Records
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 29, 2016 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc.'s motion for protective order and to seal records is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK BURKE VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 29, 2016 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Scott Co. of California's motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is off calendar pursuant to the notice of the death of plaintiff Patrick Burke. = (503/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK BURKE VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 29, 2016 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant SPX Cooling Technologies, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/GLW)
